2606.21195.title: Beyond Hooking Onto the World: Referential Profiles and the Numerical Structure of LLM Grounding
2606.21195.paper_summary: This paper revisits the grounding problem for large language models in light of recent vector-grounding accounts. I accept the shift from classical symbol grounding to vector grounding, but argue that the current debate remains incomplete in two respects. First, reference is often treated too thinly, as if it were a fixed link between an isolated expression and an object. I argue instead that reference is profile-based, context-sensitive, discourse-level, affectively shaped, and norm-governed. Even in the human case, reference is publicly stabilized through patterns of use, correction, distinction, inference, and continuation rather than through identical private representations. Second, vector grounding requires an account of numerical realization. LLMs do not acquire reference through human perception, memory, intention, embodiment, or understanding. Rather, through optimization, they parameterize linguistic traces of human world-directed practice. In a finite vector system, referential profiles must be distributed, may be superposed, and are recovered through context-sensitive computation. Weights, activations, attention-mediated hidden states, softmax-trained contrasts, and inner-product alignments are the mathematical sites at which inherited linguistic relations become stable and causally active. Mechanistic interpretability findings, including entity-like features, knowledge neurons, and emotion-related activation directions, provide indirect support for this view. They do not show that LLMs possess human reference. They support a more limited thesis: LLMs may possess derivative, language-mediated, profile-based, and numerically structured forms of reference.
2606.21195.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文重新檢視了大型語言模型的基礎問題，考慮到最近的向量基礎說法。<lb/>我接受從傳統符號基礎轉向向量基礎的變化，但我認為當前的辯論在兩個方面仍然不完整。<lb/>首先，參考通常被過於簡化地對待，就好像它是孤立表達與對象之間的固定連結。<lb/>我則主張參考是基於輪廓的、上下文敏感的、話語層面的、情感塑造的，並且受到規範約束。<lb/>即使在人的情況下，參考也是通過使用、修正、區分、推理和延續的模式來公開穩定，而不是通過相同的私人表徵。<lb/>其次，向量基礎需要對數字實現的解釋。<lb/>大型語言模型並不是通過人類的感知、記憶、意圖、具身性或理解來獲得參考。<lb/>相反，通過優化，它們對人類面向世界的實踐的語言痕跡進行參數化。<lb/>在有限的向量系統中，參考輪廓必須是分佈的，可以是重疊的，並且通過上下文敏感的計算來恢復。<lb/>權重、激活、注意力介導的隱藏狀態、softmax訓練的對比以及內積對齊是遺傳語言關係變得穩定和因果活躍的數學場域。<lb/>機械可解釋性研究結果，包括類似實體的特徵、知識神經元和情感相關的激活方向，為這一觀點提供了間接支持。<lb/>它們並未顯示大型語言模型擁有人類參考。<lb/>它們支持一個更有限的論點：大型語言模型可能擁有衍生的、語言介導的、基於輪廓的和數字結構化的參考形式。
2606.21195.author: Joo Yull Rhee et.al.
